errors.message: Skill name "This Is A Really Long Skill Name That Is Not Kebab Case And Goes Past Sixty Four Chars Limit" does not match directory name "bad-skill"
errors.fix: Change name from "This Is A Really Long Skill Name That Is Not Kebab Case And Goes Past Sixty Four Chars Limit" to "bad-skill"
errors.explanation: A name/directory mismatch causes confusion and may break skill discovery and cross-referencing.
errors.howToFix: Update the `name` field in SKILL.md frontmatter to exactly match the parent directory name, or rename the directory to match the desired skill name. The auto-fixer updates the frontmatter name.

errors.message: Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
errors.explanation: Non-standard names break URL generation, directory lookups, and cross-referencing between skills.
errors.howToFix: Rename the skill to use only lowercase letters and hyphens. Remove any uppercase letters, spaces, underscores, or special characters. Ensure the name is under 64 characters.

warnings.fix: Add a "## Usage", "## Instructions", "## Quick Start", or similar section
warnings.explanation: A missing usage section leaves users and the AI model without clear invocation instructions.
warnings.howToFix: Add a section like `## Usage`, `## Instructions`, `## Quick Start`, `## Getting Started`, `## How to Use`, or `## Examples` to the body of your SKILL.md file. Include invocation examples, expected arguments, and any flags or options the skill supports.
